# model=split-column page-FACE: PDF page 6 (printed p.8) of the 26-page Spring-2024 SOI Bulletin shows cols 1-5 of an 11-col table (item label + TY2021 + TY2022 + Percent difference + first 2 of 7 AGI brackets); cols 6-10 are on the facing page 7. Rect-bordered (filled-rect hairline rules). Item labels stored TRIMMED (the 4-level indentation is positional layout, not cell content; matches GoPDF lattice which emits no leading whitespace). 3-tier rule-4 header: a spanning label sits in its leftmost spanned col, the rest empty (All returns over cols 1-3 -> col1; Tax year 2022 by size of AGI over cols 4-5 -> col4; Item spans the 3 header tiers -> top tier). DATA = the 32 numeric rows x 5 numeric cols = 160 cells (the primary gate); the 16 section-label rows have empty numeric cells by design and are NOT in the gate. Asterisk small-sample markers kept as-printed (* 5,178 / * 74,284, Moving expenses col 4), added at publication, absent from the .xls. Footnote markers kept as-printed (Under $15,000 [1]). Negatives as-printed (-65,622,639).
